task_description: Implement Phase 2 (Real Auth with production crypto) and Phase 3 (Fastify HTTP Layer) of the Quant-Ecosystem production transformation. Phase 2 replaces all toy crypto (djb2, Math.random) with jose, argon2, otplib, and Node.js crypto. Phase 3 creates a new Fastify-based server-core package and converts QuantMail identity routes to use it.
